hero.headline_after: at the top 1% of the global economy.
hero.sub: NUVA-Gold Group of Companies is a sales, marketing, and business development firm committed to helping businesses grow, expand their market reach, and increase revenue across Nigeria and Africa to a global scale.

mission.title: Leveraging every opportunity with purpose.
mission.quote: "We partner with local businesses to strengthen their market presence and support international companies in successfully entering the Nigerian market — combining strategic expertise with deep local knowledge to drive sustainable growth."

services.title: Services built to move your business forward.
services.lede: Whatever stage your business is at, our services are structured around one outcome: getting you in front of the right customers and closing the distance between opportunity and revenue.

items.title: Sales Outsourcing & Revenue Growth
items.desc: We take on your sales function end-to-end, driving measurable revenue growth without the overhead of building an in-house team.

items.title: Marketing & Brand Promotion
items.desc: Positioning, campaigns, and brand-building that get your business noticed and remembered in a crowded market.

items.title: Market Entry Services for Foreign Companies
items.desc: A guided path into the Nigerian market — navigating regulation, culture, and consumer behaviour for international brands.

items.title: Distribution & Channel Development
items.desc: Building and managing the distribution networks that get your product physically and reliably to customers.

items.title: Business Development & Strategic Partnerships
items.desc: Identifying and structuring the partnerships that unlock new markets, capabilities, and revenue lines.

items.title: Lead Generation & Customer Acquisition
items.desc: Consistent pipelines of qualified leads, built and nurtured until they convert into paying customers.

items.title: Product Launch & Go-to-Market Execution
items.desc: From launch strategy to on-the-ground execution, we make sure new products land with impact from day one.

items.title: Trade Facilitation Between Global and African Markets
items.desc: Connecting global and African businesses, easing the trade relationships that let both sides grow together.

items.title: Meaningful over merely profitable
items.desc: We choose ventures for the difference they make first, and let commercial strength follow from doing that well.

items.title: Built to compete globally
items.desc: Every initiative is held to a standard that can stand in international markets, not just local ones.

items.title: The continent as the starting point
items.desc: Nigeria and Africa are not a market we enter — they are the vantage point everything is built from.

console.title: Sales and Marketing, running live.
console.lede: A look at the kind of activity and momentum we build behind every client engagement — from first contact to closed deal.

approach.title: How we choose to work.
approach.lede: Helping businesses grow across Nigeria and Africa takes more than strategy on paper. Here is the discipline behind how we execute for every partner and client.

items.title: Start where the need is real
items.desc: We ground each venture in a specific, lived problem or opportunity rather than an abstract market thesis.

items.title: Stay close to the work
items.desc: With a three-person founding team, every function is led by an owner, eliminating the gap between decision making and execution.

items.title: Design for the bigger stage
items.desc: Standards, partnerships, and ambitions are set with international relevance in mind from day one.

team.title: Three Founders, One team working for you.
team.lede: Every engagement is led directly by a founder, not handed off. Here are the roles each member of our team plays to drive sales and marketing results for your business.

members.name: Victoria Nsek
members.bio: Works directly with your business to shape product-market fit and build the sales and distribution channels that get you in front of the right customers.

members.name: Unwana Ekwere
members.bio: Manages your engagement end-to-end and owns the customer relationships that keep your pipeline warm and your clients retained.

members.name: Nsa Ekpo
members.role: Brand Promotion, Back-End Content & Website Management
members.bio: Builds your brand's presence — from promotional content to the digital platforms your customers meet you through.

reviews.title: Tell us how we're doing.
reviews.lede: Worked with NUVA-Gold? Rate your experience and leave a note for other businesses considering us.

contact.title: Let's talk about what we're building.

footer.slogan: Connecting businesses. Growing markets. Creating value across Africa and the world.
